subject: IGY, special email
body:
Darling Jeffrey!
I went to see IGY today. They will consider me for a junior role in the M&A
team. Still in talks with Arab Real Estate Co and Dubai Investment Group.

I REALLY want to keep pestering you with my emails, so if you could please
put me on the list to receive the special email address that will be set up
(Linda Stone told me about this).
Much love as always,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
Darling Jeffrey!
I went to see IGY today. They will consider me for a junior role in the M&A team. Still in talks with Arab Real Estate Co and Dubai Investment Group.
 
I REALLY want to keep pestering you with my emails, so if you could please put me on the list to receive the special email address that will be set up (Linda Stone told me about this).
Much love as always,
